---
title: "Events & Engagements"
description: "Explore my upcoming workshops, seminars, and conference talks on GEE and Spatial Data Science."
image: "images/trainings.jpg"
listing:
  - id: upcoming-events
    contents: events
    sort: "date asc"
    type: grid
    include:
      categories: Upcoming
    categories: false
  - id: past-events
    contents: events
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    include:
      categories: Past
    categories: false
---

I regularly participate in international conferences, workshops, and seminars to share my research on spatial data science, Google Earth Engine, and AI-driven remote sensing.

## 📅 Upcoming Events

::: {#upcoming-events}
:::

## 🏛️ Past Seminars & Workshops

::: {#past-events}
:::

---

For invitations or collaborations for guest lectures and workshops, please reach out via [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pulakeshpradhan/).
